description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a hip roof covered in dark gray shingles. The exterior walls are finished in light-colored siding with a stone or concrete foundation visible at the base. Large, rectangular windows dominate the front facade, especially in the central section, allowing for ample natural light. A prominent balcony with a blue-tinted glass or metal railing extends from one side of the house, supported by a single column. The rear features a wide covered patio area, providing sheltered outdoor space. The overall design is clean and geometric, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional, contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern two-story house with a hip roof, large windows, a balcony, and a covered patio, finished in light siding and dark roofing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large central windows, and a balcony with a blue railing on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hip roof, minimal window openings, and the extension of the balcony structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a wide covered patio area, smaller windows, and the back entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the balcony, supporting column, and several side windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large central windows and regular side windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, large glass panels, and minimal decorative elements
